Control-bus routing expression for map rows. Repeat flag to chain routes. Syntax: target=source, target=const(v), target=inv(source), target=pow(source,exp), target=mul(source,factor), target=add(source,offset), target=affine(source,scale,bias), target=clip(source,lo,hi). Targets: stretch,pitch_ratio. Sources: any numeric column present in the control-map CSV.

Alias for --time-stretch. Accepts scalar or control file (.csv/.json).
